overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character with a large backpack walking through a dark rocky canyon at night. The character pauses to look up at the moon and stars before continuing toward a distant vertical beam of light and illuminated structures on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon toward the distant vertical beam of light

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation forming the left wall of the canyon
tall dark rock formation forming the right wall of the canyon
thin vertical beam of blue-white light extending from ground to sky in the distance
cluster of illuminated buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon at night, flanked by tall dark rock walls. A mysterious vertical beam of light shines in the distance, guiding the path forward, while city lights glow faintly on the left horizon.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the moon and stars

agents.ego_description: character pauses walking to gaze up at the moon and starry sky

entered.detail: bright full moon partially obscured by thin clouds
scattered stars visible across the dark blue night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the night sky, revealing a bright moon and scattered stars. The canyon walls fall out of view as the character observes the heavens, with the vertical beam now appearing lower in the frame.

events.description: camera tilts back down to resume forward walking perspective

agents.ego_description: resuming the journey through the canyon as it widens into an open rocky landscape

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation on the left side of the path
tall dark rock formation on the right side of the path
cluster of illuminated buildings visible on the horizon
expansive open rocky terrain visible ahead where the canyon opens up

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the forward walking view as the character continues through the canyon. The terrain gradually opens up to reveal a wider wasteland ahead, with the vertical beam still guiding the path forward and city lights visible on the left horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive rocky canyon that eventually opens into a vast, illuminated wasteland. It begins with the character walking between tall, dark rock walls, guided by a mysterious vertical beam of light in the distance and faint city glows on the left horizon. As the character pauses, the camera tilts upward to leave the canyon walls behind, focusing instead on a bright moon and scattered stars in the night sky. The view then shifts back downward to the path ahead, following the character as the narrow passage gradually expands. The scene finally opens into a wide wasteland, with the distant beam of light and city lights remaining as focal points on the horizon.
